steps.title: Identify the vertex as the maximum of the parabola
steps.content: The question asks where plant diversity is greatest. Since the parabola opens downward, the maximum occurs at the vertex—the highest point on the curve.

steps.title: Read the elevation of the peak from the graph
steps.content:
Tracing from the peak of the parabola down to the elevation axis, the vertex occurs at approximately 1,250 meters. The peak lies between the 1,000 and 1,500 gridlines, positioned roughly in that region.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
